subject: fix(claude): remove hardcoded pattern list from Suggested Implementations
body:
The parenthetical list "(PWA, debug system, icons, PDF, proxy, etc.)"
limited what patterns an AI might look for. Replaced with generic
language directing to always check the source for current patterns.

Tags: docs, claude-md, patterns
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-project-sync
Semver: patch
